name: harness-engineering
description: Design, build, verify, and maintain a personalized AI operating harness on Claude Code, Claude Cowork, or Codex through a source-first interview and reversible guided workflow.

interface.shortDescription: Build a personal AI operating harness on Claude Code, Cowork, or Codex.
interface.longDescription: Interview the user, inspect the current environment on the resolved platform, plan a right-sized harness, apply approved changes with backups, and verify the result with fresh evidence. Platform-aware: CLAUDE.md chains and settings on Claude Code, contract files and .plugin delivery on Claude Cowork, AGENTS.md chains and marketplaces on Codex.
defaultPrompt: Design and build my AI operating harness.
Audit my current Claude Code, Cowork, or Codex setup.
Verify that my harness really works.
